decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-26. The two-file split between TransitionTable and Machine, the order-workflow transitions, and the unchanged-on-invalid and listener-ordering tests are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

fail_to_pass.name: valid_transitions
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^valid transitions advance state and record history$' tests/machine.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: invalid_unchanged
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^invalid transition throws and leaves the machine unchanged$' tests/machine.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: can_reflects
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^can reflects the allowed events of the current state$' tests/machine.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: on_transition
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^onTransition notifies listeners with the payload, in order$' tests/machine.test.ts
